response.justification: The candidate is a skilled and experienced software engineer, but their profile is a very poor match for the mandatory requirements of this role. Their professional C++ experience is minimal (under one year) and not recent, falling far short of the 5-10 years required. Furthermore, they lack the specified Windows platform experience and the essential domain knowledge in Capital Markets, Fixed Income, or Investment Banking. Their expertise lies in web technologies (TypeScript, Node.js) and the D language, which are not relevant to this position.
strengths: Extensive experience as a senior software engineer with a polyglot background.
Demonstrates strong communication and mentoring skills through workshops and public speaking.
Good experience with modern development practices like CI/CD, TDD, and DevOps.
concerns: Lacks the required 5-10 years of professional C++ experience; has less than one year from nearly a decade ago.
No experience in the required Capital Markets or Fixed Income domains.
Primary development experience is not on the required Windows platform.
